patient.title: Patient
patient.description: Patient record in the ShiftPass system.

responsibleNurse.description: Name of the nurse currently in charge.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last record update.

situation.description: Detailed text describing current clinical state.

pendingList.description: List of outstanding clinical/operational checklist items.

alerts.description: List of active health alerts and risk tags.

observations.description: Free-form clinical observations and general comments.

nextShiftSummary.description: Short, high-impact summary for the incoming shift.

history.title: History
history.description: Chronological history log of handovers recorded for patients.

recordedBy.description: Name or email of the nurse who registered this handover.

situation.description: Clinical state recorded at the time of handover.

pendingList.description: Checklist items state at the time of handover.

alerts.description: Active alerts recorded at the time of handover.

observations.description: Observations recorded at the time of handover.

/patients/{patientId}/history/{historyId.description: Subcollection of historical handover logs for a specific patient.
